DisableContextMenu.title: Disable Context Menu
DisableContextMenu.description: If true, the toolbar context menu is disabled.

HideContinueButtons.title: Hide Continue Buttons
HideContinueButtons.description: If true, the warning page continue buttons are hidden.

HideReportButton.title: Hide Report Button
HideReportButton.description: If true, the warning page report button is hidden.

DisableClearAllowedWebsites.title: Disable Clear Allowed Websites
DisableClearAllowedWebsites.description: If true, the clear-allowed-websites action is disabled.

IgnoreFrameNavigation.title: Ignore Frame Navigation
IgnoreFrameNavigation.description: If true, frame navigation events are ignored.

LockProtectionOptions.title: Lock Protection Options
LockProtectionOptions.description: If true, provider toggles and provider settings are locked in the options page.

DisableResetButtons.title: Disable Reset Buttons
DisableResetButtons.description: If true, reset actions in the settings page are disabled.

DisableCustomProviders.title: Disable Custom Providers
DisableCustomProviders.description: If true, custom providers are hidden and cannot be created, modified, deleted, or enabled.

DisableThirdPartyIntegrations.title: Disable Third-Party Integrations
DisableThirdPartyIntegrations.description: If true, third-party direct integrations are disabled and cannot be enabled from settings.

SecLookupApiKey.title: SecLookup API Key
SecLookupApiKey.description: Managed API key for the SecLookup integration.

HideProtectionOptions.title: Hide Protection Options
HideProtectionOptions.description: If true, protection options are hidden from the popup and options page.

AdGuardSecurityEnabled.title: AdGuard Security DNS Enabled
AdGuardSecurityEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for AdGuard Security DNS.

AdGuardFamilyEnabled.title: AdGuard Family DNS Enabled
AdGuardFamilyEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for AdGuard Family DNS.

AlphaMountainEnabled.title: AlphaMountain Web Protection Enabled
AlphaMountainEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for AlphaMountain Web Protection.

ChainPatrolEnabled.title: ChainPatrol Web Protection Enabled
ChainPatrolEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for ChainPatrol Web Protection.

PrecisionSecEnabled.title: PrecisionSec Web Protection Enabled
PrecisionSecEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for PrecisionSec Web Protection.

CERTEEEnabled.title: CERT-EE Security DNS Enabled
CERTEEEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for CERT-EE Security DNS.

CleanBrowsingSecurityEnabled.title: CleanBrowsing Security DNS Enabled
CleanBrowsingSecurityEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for CleanBrowsing Security DNS.

CleanBrowsingFamilyEnabled.title: CleanBrowsing Family DNS Enabled
CleanBrowsingFamilyEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for CleanBrowsing Family DNS.

CloudflareSecurityEnabled.title: Cloudflare Security DNS Enabled
CloudflareSecurityEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Cloudflare Security DNS.

CloudflareFamilyEnabled.title: Cloudflare Family DNS Enabled
CloudflareFamilyEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Cloudflare Family DNS.

ControlDSecurityEnabled.title: Control D Security DNS Enabled
ControlDSecurityEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Control D Security DNS.

ControlDFamilyEnabled.title: Control D Family DNS Enabled
ControlDFamilyEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Control D Family DNS.

PhishDestroyEnabled.title: PhishDestroy Feed Enabled
PhishDestroyEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for PhishDestroy Feed.

PhishingDatabaseEnabled.title: Phishing.Database Feed Enabled
PhishingDatabaseEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Phishing.Database Feed.

Quad9Enabled.title: Quad9 Security DNS Enabled
Quad9Enabled.description: Managed enabled state for Quad9 Security DNS.

SwitchCHEnabled.title: Switch.ch Security DNS Enabled
SwitchCHEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Switch.ch Security DNS.
